label: The Flowmap Bunkroom
description: The Flowmap Bunkroom forms a narrow sleep cell set into The Lumen Sump’s recessed pressure-well, its walls clad in the same matte, light-absorbing composite scored with navigational hashmarks. A single berth and fold-down desk are bolted to ribbed bulkheads, while vibration baffles and sound-deadening panels preserve the tavern’s engineered quiet. Recessed guidance lamps project the hushlit particulate stream as slow ceiling flow-maps, calibrated as both nightlight and orientation aid. A compact air-scrub cabinet and sealed storage niches reflect Radiance Current Port’s decontamination standards and vacuum-rated resilience.
